subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned towards Him! Forget not God's favor upon thee, for He hath ordained for thee the good of the world to come and of this world, and hath vouchsafed unto thee His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مقبل لاتنس فضل الله علیک انه قدر لک خیر الاخرة و الاولی و رزقک لقائه الذی
